## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Bridget McGillivray (growthx.ai) and Ray Charles for a potential operations role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ray has a diverse background in consulting, tech operations, and project management, with experience in scaling processes and implementing knowledge bases.](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [growthx.ai is a 7-month-old AI company experiencing rapid growth, aiming to scale from 30 to 100 clients and employees by year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [The role focuses on building scalable systems, automating processes, and implementing tools to manage growth and gain deep customer insights.](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)

## Topics

### Ray's Professional Background

  - [Started in consulting at McKinsey (Perth office) for 3 years, focusing on operational efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Transitioned to tech, working for a private equity-style firm (Mason) that acquires and improves distressed businesses](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Currently at Simple Texting (acquired by Cinch), handling operations, project management, and client-facing projects](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Experience in implementing company-wide tools (Slack, Notion) and creating comprehensive knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Simple Texting/Cinch Overview

  - [Text message provider for businesses (e.g., Uber, Google, two-factor authentication)](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [\~200 employees at Simple Texting](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Pricing based on message volume (credits system)](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Enterprise clients start at $1,500/month, with larger clients spending $250k-$300k](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Total customer base around 1,000, mix of small self-service and larger enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### Ray's Project Examples

  - [Consolidated messaging platforms to Slack across the organization](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Implemented Notion as a company-wide knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Created customer-facing help pages and integrated them with Intercom for support](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Established monthly review process to keep knowledge base current](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

### growthx.ai Company Overview and Role Requirements

  - [7-month-old AI company with 30 current clients, aiming for 100 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [30 employees, planning to grow to 100 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Current challenges include scaling systems and processes to match rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Need for improved automation and tools beyond current reliance on Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Focus on building scalable systems, implementing new tools, and leveraging AI for customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Unique "agency-like" model for customer interactions, requiring tailored approach to customer success](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to discuss the interview with Marilia](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [growthx.ai team to determine next steps and communicate them to Ray](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Ray to await further information on the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/ExH4dHmGAP3VF_u4J6x7GsAEDgiCsxXv?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
